response.justification: Nearly two decades of hands-on full-stack and systems experience with some recent AI-agent tooling work, but the trajectory is senior/staff-level IC delivery rather than the director-level strategic and AI thought leadership this role demands; there is no recognized AI expertise, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of advising organizations on cloud/AI strategy or shipping AI-powered products at scale.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Entrepreneurial experience as founder of an open-source geo-data platform
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise as the role requires
Career level is senior/staff IC, well below director-level strategic scope
No cloud/AI strategy, customer advisory, or engineering leadership track record

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap versus director-level strategic role
Long, broad engineering experience with startup/founder background
